title: Fix failing security/snyk check on PR #159

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating failing security/snyk status on PR #159 (target develop). Local Snyk integration exists via kbs snyk pull but cannot fetch finding details without SNYK_TOKEN. Branch currently pins langchain-core=0.3.81; proceeding with dependency bump to 0.3.84+ and lock refresh to match Snyk fix direction.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User requested immediate PR #159 repair. Proceeding with conflict resolution against develop in an isolated worktree to avoid touching unrelated local changes, then validating and pushing fixes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Resolved PR #159 merge conflicts by merging origin/develop into feature/feedback-alignment-timeline-review and pushing commit 3c1c55848. Conflict files fixed: dashboard/app/lab/reports/[id]/page.tsx, dashboard/app/lab/reports/edit/[id]/page.tsx, dashboard/components/ReportConfigurationSelector.tsx, dashboard/components/report-configuration-edit.tsx, dashboard/package.json. Root cause: head branch diverged from develop in these files. Current checks: Snyk passed (no manifest changes); Actions runs 24398884783 and 24398884819 are in progress for dashboard/python suites.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up CI fix after merge resolution: Dashboard Unit Tests failed in both runs 24398884783/24398884819 during TypeScript Type Check with TS1128 in dashboard/components/ReportConfigurationSelector.tsx:23. Root cause was a typo in generic call syntax (listFromModel<...>} instead of listFromModel<...>). Pushed fix commit 45617f7e4 to PR head branch.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: PR #159 is now conflict-free and green on head sha 45617f7e4. GitHub status: mergeable=CLEAN/MERGEABLE. Checks passed: Dashboard Unit Tests, Dashboard Storybook Tests, Python Tests 3.11/3.12, Snyk. Marking this bug closed.
